title: Hail Caught on Camera Pummelling Nebraska Home
transcript:
It's a crazy scene in Florida.
An alligator appears to ring the doorbell.
Anybody home?
Then the creature tries to claw his way into the front door.
As his good buddy hangs out on the porch.
Imagine waking up to these monsters at your front door.
Did they actually ring your doorbell?
He looked in it and he scratched it. He tried to touch it.
The big joke down here is it's mating season,
So they were looking for, you know, a nice room.
And monster hail pummels a front porch.
It's not much safer inside.
It's shattering the kitchen windows.
It just started sounding like gunshots going off. It was so loud.
Mother Nature's wrath came down on Jacob and Chelsi Petit just outside Omaha.
We had every bit of 3-inch hail coming down at us.
How scary was that?
It was terrifying.
The hail was coming so sideways through the window, it was denting a stove...
...on the other side of the kitchen.
Tornado winds also struck Omaha.
Watch as construction workers cling for dear life to a metal roof.
